title: excubitor: Safety fences for autonomous coding agents - mechanical guards, loop discipline, and a falsifiable intent-record system
description: Stdlib-only Python hooks plus Agent Skills-format capability packets that let an LLM coding agent work unattended without trusting it to bless its own work. Provides mechanical version-control guards, loop discipline, and a falsifiable intent-record (telos) system. The guard's decision core is runtime-neutral: a second, non-Claude-Code adapter drives the same code under an equivalence test, so its portability is demonstrated rather than asserted.
